name: Team MJ
subject: Peter, do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We can't take our foot off the gas with early voting in just 16 days.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053e5/495050567/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, did you see this? We can't take our foot off the gas with early voting in **just 16 days.**

**Yesterday, 14 people donated from your area. If we can bring in 7 more donations from your area today, we'll be on track to meet our goal. [Will you be one of the 7 donors we need and pitch in now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053e4/495050567/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200202.3nd__853__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thank you for your support.

\-- Team MJ
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar Campaign Manager**
Subject: we need 11 folks from your area to help defeat Senator Cornyn
> | **MJ for Texas
>
> Donors Needed From Your Area**: _11_
> **Deadline:** _Approaching_ **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053db/495050567/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200202.3nd__853__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
> ---
> Team -- it's now or never. After nearly two decades in Washington, **Senator John Cornyn has an over _$12 MILLION_ WAR CHEST **that's heavily funded by corporate PACs. Texans are hungry for change, but MJ will need your help to defeat Senator Cornyn and his big money backers next November.
>
> Early voting on the primary starts in just 16 days. We need to build the most powerful team we can before the primary if we're going to compete with Sen. Cornyn and his war chest in November. **That 's why we have a plan to go town by town and city by city.**
>
> **We need to bring in 11 more donations** before MONDAY to stay on track to meet our goal. **Will you be one of those 11 donors we need to pitch in now?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> ****[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053da/495050567/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200202.3nd__853__&amount=5")****
> ****[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053d9/495050567/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200202.3nd__853__&amount=10")****
> ****[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053d8/495050567/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200202.3nd__853__&amount=25")****
> ****[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053df/495050567/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200202.3nd__853__&amount=50")****
> ****[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053de/495050567/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200202.3nd__853__")****
> Thanks,
>
> Preston Elliott
> Campaign Manager, MJ for Texas
>
>
>
> [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890468/7f51f7bc/4d64da4e/4ef053e4/495050567/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200202.3nd__853__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Can you chip in for the first time before the big day to turn out as many caucus-goers as possible?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're putting our grassroots contributions to work in real time. Every dollar we receive helps to contact Iowans face-to-face, over the phone, and online to turn out as many supporters for Elizabeth.. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a34a/45c30650/1e514385e/66e3d4d9/1264202403/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Even though people across the country are already voting, _tomorrow_ will be seen by the billionaires and the pundits as the start of the Democratic primary.

They'll turn to the results of the Iowa caucuses to gauge the strength of our grassroots movement.

They'll be waiting to see how big the support for Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change is.

We've spent the past year building a strong ground game in Iowa, and now we're relying on grassroots supporters like you to chip in for the first time before the big day to turn out as many caucus-goers as possible.

Every second today is a new chance for a volunteer to call an undecided voter, or for an organizer to knock on a door, and for someone to see an ad for Elizabeth's plans.

**We're putting our grassroots contributions to work in real time today. Every dollar we receive helps to contact Iowans face-to-face, over the phone, and online to turn out as many supporters for Elizabeth as possible tomorrow.**

**[Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now? Your first donation before the Iowa caucuses will immediately be used to organize for Elizabeth.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a34a/45c30650/1e514385e/66e3d4d8/1264202403/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8wNUZfRUdSX1ZPVF9DXzIwMjAwMjAyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO05F_EGR_VOT_C_20200202_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
Hi Friend,

It's Melissa again. House districts in Minnesota are pretty small--and that's on purpose. Your Representative is your first point of contact with the Capitol, and DFLers in the House work hard to keep open lines of communication with their constituents.

Our DFL representatives want to know what your priorities are for you and your family.

[Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/q3LWXywCgGAOCCPrXjyivcUYxPZvyk0xCVOxXYBdIZU=),[ can you give me your input?](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/Uu56-89xM7dbJxvTGlEkcy54Z75PViG1_cKTWhtp0MQ=) I know you're busy, so it's only a few questions. I'll make sure to pass your feedback along to the other DFL representatives.

Thanks,

Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House

[**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/v_-4SUByJwpu2XpdzGDjTAQgsVER0JadqK31OIZB0aQ=)

Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---
DFL House Caucus
255 E Plato Blvd
Saint Paul MN 55107 United States

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/3EGRhTX74v5YqxQqvqfIK2whF9SeW9AmzxzrXVYRMXE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/PrXRl4Exg1gMkKCVEjTu-tv4IVj6Md9oYCohhWT8z_w=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/ijRxPTYD7sqYm4Tv7bE98VDUhmpIsjL4GTMnYXLlDlo=)

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/DN6Pkf6-2eB2icHaC9T2QNpmcfbz8askv9kTevNfgAw=/tZ4HBA8pdBGyKd8t-EB2FnxhTeNBqDr4jjWN4nyiyKc=).

Our DFL representatives want to know what your priorities are for you and your family. = I know you're busy, so it's only a few questions. I'll make sure to pass your feedback along to the other DFL representatives. Thanks, Melissa Hortman Speaker of the House = Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. DFL House Caucus 255 E Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107 United States = = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

Listen up, team.

I endorsed Michael Bennet because he would be the best President of the United States. Period.

[He has less in common with Donald Trump than any human being on the planet when it comes to worldview, priorities, and demeanor. Michael is the opposite of Trump and is the best Democrat to take him on.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaad8/134673f2/37a7bdc9/69972f89/4027493883/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/carville-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B4_020220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: It’s impossible for me to think about the caucuses tomorrow without thinking about how far we’ve come.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Are you still with me?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S) Yang Gang --

It’s impossible for me to think about the caucuses tomorrow without thinking about how far we’ve come.

How did an Asian guy from New York with no name ID, no PACs, and no special interest backers become a top-tier contender for the Democratic nomination?

The only answer is you, Yang Gang. And the power of what we’re fighting for.

In less than 24 hours, Iowans will head to their caucus sites and make their final decisions. It will be the biggest moment of our campaign to date.

**[I have to make a personal ask of you one more time before they do. Can you pitch in $10 or more tonight so I know you’re with me?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24390?t=5&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24390?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24390?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S)
---

---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24390?t=11&amount=25&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S)
---
Whether you joined this campaign yesterday or two years ago, I couldn’t be more proud to have you with us. Thank you for everything you’ve done.

Every dollar, every phone call, every conversation with a friend -- you are the reason we are in contention tomorrow.

I can never thank you enough for that,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24390?t=12&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S)
---

But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6950%2E377263%2EVqjr_S) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

| Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw Mayor Nutter's email. He'll be joining Mike **TOMORROW** to talk about the number one priority for Democrats this year: nominating a candidate who can defeat Donald Trump. We need a strong Democrat who can bring the party together and build the operation it will take to defeat Trump. Mike Bloomberg is the only candidate who has been campaigning against Donald Trump in the battleground states (like Pennsylvania!) that will decide the election in November. **[Join us Tuesday, February 4th at 6:00 PM at the National Constitution Center in Philadelphia!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14596877/153207070/444058246?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzQvMS84MDA1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2ZiNjRhOS1hNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhBvmKs0d54ZtBYJsAf8QIaB7ELt8ENGDSYPExckzkI=&emci=9d9f5340-a046-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b3fb64a9-a446-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=54478)** | [RSVP »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14596878/153207071/444058246?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzQvMS84MDA1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2ZiNjRhOS1hNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhBvmKs0d54ZtBYJsAf8QIaB7ELt8ENGDSYPExckzkI=&emci=9d9f5340-a046-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b3fb64a9-a446-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=54478)

From: Mayor Michael Nutter
Date: February 1, 2020
Subject: Join Mike & Me In Philly
Friend --
As Mayor of Philadelphia, I saw how communities are lifted up when we make progress on big issues: gun violence, the environment, and access to high-quality health care.
Mike Bloomberg is the right candidate to take on Trump because he has a proven record of success on those issues -- that’s why I’m proud to support him and honored to welcome him to my hometown.
Supporters are coming from across the region and I wanted to make sure you have all of the details in case you can join us too!

Michael Nutter

clean_body: | Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw Mayor Nutter's email. He'll be joining Mike TOMORROW to talk about the number one priority for Democrats this year: nominating a candidate who can defeat Donald Trump. We need a strong Democrat who can bring the party together and build the operation it will take to defeat Trump. Mike Bloomberg is the only candidate who has been campaigning against Donald Trump in the battleground states (like Pennsylvania!) that will decide the election in November. | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Mayor Michael Nutter Date: February 1, 2020 Subject: Join Mike & Me In Philly Friend -- As Mayor of Philadelphia, I saw how communities are lifted up when we make progress on big issues: gun violence, the environment, and access to high-quality health care. Mike Bloomberg is the right candidate to take on Trump because he has a proven record of success on those issues -- that’s why I’m proud to support him and honored to welcome him to my hometown. Supporters are coming from across the region and I wanted to make sure you have all of the details in case you can join us too! See you there! Michael Nutter When: Tuesday, February 4th 6:00 pm - 8:00 pm Where: National Constitution Center 525 Arch St. Philadelphia, PA 19106 RSVP: | | | ---|---|---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Recently, I was asked a question that made me think:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I feel deeply blessed that I had the chance to live my 18-year-old self's dream -- and end up somewhere that younger Elizabeth would have never even imagined. But those same doors that opened for... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a352/45c30650/1e5022058/66e3d9c8/3066642759/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Recently, someone asked me a question that made me think:

"What do you think your 18-year-old self would think of you now? Would she be surprised?"

Well, _yeah_ she'd be surprised!

Eighteen-year-old Elizabeth was two years into college and about to drop out and get married.

My 18-year-old self wanted to be a public school teacher so much, but that opportunity was about to get so far away, it would seem to disappear from sight.

**But it turned out just one door had to open: a commuter college for $50 a semester. That one door opened, and I got to graduate college and become a special ed teacher in a public school.**

And then another door opened, and another door opened, and another door opened. And now, many years and many doors later, I'm a United States senator and a candidate for president.

I feel deeply blessed that I had the chance to live my 18-year-old self's dream -- and end up somewhere that younger Elizabeth would have never even imagined. **But those same doors that opened for me and my family aren't opening for so many families today.

I'm in this fight to create opportunities -- to open doors -- for everyone in this country, but it's going to take a grassroots movement for big, structural change fighting by my side.**

**[And I'm so grateful you're in this fight too. Tonight, Iowa will kick off the next phase of the primary, and I'm counting on this team more than ever. Can you chip in $2, or whatever you can, before tonight's caucuses and help power this campaign?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a352/45c30650/1e5022058/66e3d9cb/3066642759/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8xM0ZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjAzX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO13F_EGR_EWD_E_20200203_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

body:
Thanks to you, we met our first monthly goal of 2020. Words cannot express how grateful I am for your support. This grassroots team is the greatest strength we have on our side, and it’s why we’re going to win in November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14601523/153249498/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.03_b1_ed_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTYzYzRjMC1iNTQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQD-Ua2zIb5ilfagK4_FJpW8iaugrp45F5Cd9NrYkLI=) Team,

**Thanks to you, we met our first monthly goal of 2020.** Words cannot express how grateful I am for your support. This grassroots team is the greatest strength we have on our side, and it’s why we’re going to win in November.

Team, when I told you that we have a fight ahead of us, I wasn’t exaggerating. We are going to face many challenges between now and Election Day, but because of you, I’m more optimistic than ever that we will flip this seat blue.

Thank you for everything you do to support this campaign. I could not be more grateful to have you on my side.

Thank you,

Eugene
_P.S. We may have met our goal last month, but thanks to an influx of special interest money, our opponent Scott Perry outraised us last quarter.[**If you would like to make a contribution to help us get a head start on our February goal, I would greatly appreciate it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14601524/153249499/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.03_b1_ed_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTYzYzRjMC1iNTQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQD-Ua2zIb5ilfagK4_FJpW8iaugrp45F5Cd9NrYkLI=)_ | Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:

Thank you for everything you do to support this campaign. I could not be more grateful to have you on my side. Thank you, Eugene P.S. We may have met our goal last month, but thanks to an influx of special interest money, our opponent Scott Perry outraised us last quarter.= | Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | = Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Team -- following up on yesterday's email.
**Donald Trump scheduled a rally in New Hampshire for the night before the primary so that he can unseat Granite State Democrats, and we don't have much time to respond.[Will you please donate whatever you can to help raise $10,000 to stop his momentum?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc351/2a380d31/2290ee7f/f0f45c/2578996260/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwM18yMDIwMDEyN3RydW1wbmgyLXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200203_20200127trumpnh2-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

name: Sara 2020
subject: We're launching an emergency fundraising drive so we'll have the resources we need to win this race. Will you help us hit our goal by making a $3 contribution now?
body:
Friday night, Susan Collins voted against an amendment...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1c4/1559481460/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Friday night, Senator Collins voted against an amendment to subpoena key impeachment witnesses and White House, OMB, DOD and State Department documents.
Senator Collins voted 12 times during this trial against hearing from witnesses and evaluating important evidence. Then she took one vote in favor of witnesses for political cover only when she knew it was doomed to fail -- she never had any intention of hearing the facts in this trial.
That's why we're launching an **emergency fundraising drive** -- so we'll have the resources we need to win this race and replace Senator Collins with someone who will do the right thing.
**[Our goal is to raise $100,000 before the Senate takes a final vote on Wednesday. Will you help us hit it by making a $3 contribution now?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1db/1559481460/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200203-1-full")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1db/1559481460/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200203-1-full")**********
We know Senator Collins will only vote against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome. She puts Mitch McConnell before Maine when it matters. That's why it's time to replace her in the Senate.
\- Team Sara

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1da/1559481460/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1d9/1559481460/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802914/4bef7a87/6d7ceaec/287fb1d8/1559481460/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:

| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make an important donation -- if you've been waiting to invest in this campaign - now is the time.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaad4/134673f2/37b9c9f0/69972f08/1264718045/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020320_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We've officially made it to the starting line! I have no doubt we're going to surprise people over the next week.

We've been counted out and underestimated, but we've withstood and outlasted so many. Here's the thing: [More than half of voters are still undecided, and I know I'm the candidate we need to beat Trump and restore decency to the White House.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaad4/134673f2/37b9c9f0/69972f08/1264718045/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020320_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
We want to say THANK YOU! Your support is what makes our movement possible. We must continue building momentum to help President Trump and his Republican Majority win in 2020.

Friend,

We want to take a moment to say THANK YOU! This January was one of our best months ever, which means we are going into this competitive election year with a strong start.

It's all thanks to your support and the support of grassroots conservatives across America who are helping us fight for conservative values, grow the economy, and keep Making America Great!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Monday Starts an Excellent Week for President Trump
body:
Tomorrow night, President Trump delivers his third State of the Union Address. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1b66f1636&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Monday Starts an Excellent Week for President Trump**

Tomorrow night, President Trump delivers his third State of the Union Address.

“He’ll quite rightly be able to declare the nation is strong — with solid economic growth and jobs for all who want them and a Dow more than 50 percent higher than when he won the White House. Not to mention a new North American trade agreement just as candidate Trump promised, China desperate to end the trade war and America’s NATO allies paying much more of their fair share for collective defense.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae261a6be9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Here's the reality. By most traditional measures, the economy is stronger than it's been in over three decades, especially where job creation is concerned . . . More people are working, and because real wages are rising, they have the ‘hope,’ finally, that Obama promised but found so hard to deliver,” Pete Roff writes for [_Newsweek_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2edb272fe&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.newsweek.com/face-it-economy-under-trump-great-opinion-1484645").
---
|
---
| “In his opening statement at trial, [Rep. Adam] Schiff revealed his real reason for needing an impeachment do-over. He accused the president in advance of cheating in the 2020 election and suggested that Americans would be manipulated and make the wrong decision at the ballot box. So much for the will of the people,” Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6264d490b6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Army veteran Tony Rankins will be a guest of President Trump and the First Lady at tomorrow night’s State of the Union. Rankins is a recovering drug user who now works in construction in a Cincinnati “opportunity zone,” which are low-income areas that receive tax advantages to spur investment. Opportunity zones were created by President Trump’s 2017 tax cuts law, Jason Williams reports for the [_Cincinnati Enquirer_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3eed916e6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b91e907ba4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4e77e0747&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f233b0493d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Do you want to watch Trump with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Your Tuesday night *could* be boring. OR... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a20e4c78c41a/do-you-want-to-watch-trump-with-me?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Your Tuesday night *could* be boring.

**OR!** **It could be filled with a show-stopping State of the Union by President Trump, watching the event with lots of other liberty-loving Texans, and picking up your free Trump sign!**

Will you join me tomorrow night, Tuesday, February 4, and the Pearland Area Republican Club at the State of the Union Watch Party in Pearland?

Let’s show our support for President Trump, especially as he is about to be ACQUITTED from the bogus charges the House of Representatives levied against him.

I will be at the Stadia Sports Grill to stand up for President Trump because he needs OUR support to build the wall and stop illegal immigration.

* * *

---
|
---
| **WATCH PARTY DETAILS**

7:00 pm – Meet and Greet
8:00 pm – President Trump addresses our country

Stadia Sports Grill
[1853 Pearland Pkwy #135
Pearland, TX 77581](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=fc74ef3cf7&e=01c99b7fbd)

* * *

I am running for Congress because you and I need to win the House back and pass President Trump’s entire agenda to continue the **UNPRECEDENTED ACCOMPLISHMENTS** of the last three years.

In addition to showing our support for President Trump, if you have any questions about my campaign, I’d love for you to attend so I can answer your questions in person.

Hit reply to this email so I can know to expect you in the crowd!

See you tomorrow evening.

For Liberty, Kathaleen
---
|
---

name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: Send Andrew a personal note of encouragement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Tonight will be historic. Let Andrew know you are with him today.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ) Yang Gang --

Today is the day -- Iowans will head to caucus. We have poured our hearts out to spread our Humanity First vision for our country. And nobody has done that more than Andrew, logging hundreds of thousands of miles -- first in a rag-tag van where nobody knew his name and now in an official campaign tour bus -- greeting thousands of supporters at a time.

Andrew’s worked his heart out for the past two years, criss-crossing Iowa countless times. And today he’s doing everything he physically can to turn out caucus-goers.

**As Andrew canvasses across Iowa today, we want to send him words of encouragement straight from you.[Send him a personal note -- it would make his day to know he has your support today. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/ay-email-20200203-caucus-message?source=email-20200203AM-all&t=6&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ)** | [SEND NOTE](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/ay-email-20200203-caucus-message?source=email-20200203AM-all&t=7&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ)
---
Thank you for your support. Now let’s get ready for a historic caucus tonight -- the moment this campaign peaks at the right time.

Let’s do this,

Yang2020 HQ
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24456?t=2&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=7028%2E377263%2EBfPYzJ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

Urgent, Peter --

Today is the final day to register to vote in the Texas primary, and early voting begins just two weeks from tomorrow. **[MJ needs your help to keep reaching undecided voters](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890474/7f51f7bc/4d79393a/4ef0542c/2610258210/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primary-registration-deadline?refcode=email_20200203.1nd__857__&amount=10&recurring=true")** so she can win the primary and BEAT Sen. Cornyn!

We know that MJ is the best candidate to win in November, but you don't just have to take it from us. _The San Antonio Express-News_ reported that **" Decorated veteran MJ Hegar's candidacy brings heat to [the] 2020 Texas Senate race."** Now we need YOUR HELP to keep it going!

**We set a goal of raising $30,000 by midnight tonight, because after this voter registration deadline we have just TWO WEEKS before voting begins to spread our message.[Will you rush a donation right now to help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890474/7f51f7bc/4d79393a/4ef0542c/2610258210/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primary-registration-deadline?refcode=email_20200203.1nd__857__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Your help is _crucial_ if we're going to reach this goal. While Sen. Cornyn has an army of corporate PACs and special interest groups rushing to his defense, MJ is relying on _you_.

**We 're proud to be powered by a grassroots team of 29,000 donors and counting with an average contribution of just $22. Will you join the team and make your first donation today to help us reach our $30,000 goal?***

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | **[_Wow! Since our beloved President called us to action to flip the Senate, Democrats EVISCERATED McConnell 's lead in the polls! Will you answer President Obama's call before midnight to seal the deal? Rush $10 to elect Ben Ray and OUST McConnell's Senate! >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200203_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")** FIRST President Obama personally called on us to defeat McConnell's Senate. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200203_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

THEN
Democrats stepped up in a historic way -- and ERASED McConnell's lead in the polls!

[](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200203_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

NOW
If just 216 more Democrats step up for Ben Ray before midnight, he'll WIN his Senate race and OUST McConnell's Senate.

This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot -- we won't get another one like it.

Will you step up with $10 in these final 12 hours?

| ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200203_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c71/1713406653/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c76/1713406653/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c77/1713406653/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c74/1713406653/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c75/1713406653/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f1/18e32a7f/51ad3ab5/7b224c6a/1713406653/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Claire Chase
subject: Could You Imagine?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Today is the first Democratic presidential primary, and I pray the Iowa Caucus voters know what kind of world they are voting for.
It's a world where open-borders allow millions and millions of unvetted illegal immigrants to enter our country. It's a world where you wait for months to see a doctor. It's a world where you don't have a right to self-defense and the government will arrest you if you own a gun they don't like.
---
| | | [Don't Let this Nightmare Become Reality](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WSkwnUhBR0EAIsq11UUgluuHGioT-HAaze5hAXjnH5bNcnvxmaWJDA8i78h7VCd_UHNKbjR7N22ZL22EHN_mvBVICEwSBFo7f3UtIYdYbIloI2sf2CUTPBDEThMP1Y0MtG0krTQe9Aj6JaDhrGuZiNGbtGAiw6OmVuto6X7Ybj3OwVl0TvRmIafEvrL3Lz8YU5D-_W_t_bE=&c=EdjZK-t__XnLhDESgJ4shYzNnPfXOZVheYziCD2AUWFgUoyMCUSibg==&ch=QZVvzNM4CqnnMBCbl65sejZ7FSIuba8qmBr__jJbeeZJIvAyleGUzg==)
---
| Could you imagine being forced to vote for a candidate who would take away your Constitutional right to bear arms? If your choice was figuring out how much welfare we should give to illegal immigrants? Those poor Democrat Iowa Caucus voters ...
---
| | | [Stand Up Against Socialism!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WSkwnUhBR0EAIsq11UUgluuHGioT-HAaze5hAXjnH5bNcnvxmaWJDA8i78h7VCd_UHNKbjR7N22ZL22EHN_mvBVICEwSBFo7f3UtIYdYbIloI2sf2CUTPBDEThMP1Y0MtG0krTQe9Aj6JaDhrGuZiNGbtGAiw6OmVuto6X7Ybj3OwVl0TvRmIafEvrL3Lz8YU5D-_W_t_bE=&c=EdjZK-t__XnLhDESgJ4shYzNnPfXOZVheYziCD2AUWFgUoyMCUSibg==&ch=QZVvzNM4CqnnMBCbl65sejZ7FSIuba8qmBr__jJbeeZJIvAyleGUzg==)

| If the Democrats' dream is your nightmare, if you want to preserve the country our forefathers sacrificed so much to build, then [please consider donating $5, $10, $25, or even $50 so we can show the country that New Mexico will not bend to socialism.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WSkwnUhBR0EAIsq11UUgluuHGioT-HAaze5hAXjnH5bNcnvxmaWJDA8i78h7VCd_UHNKbjR7N22ZL22EHN_mvBVICEwSBFo7f3UtIYdYbIloI2sf2CUTPBDEThMP1Y0MtG0krTQe9Aj6JaDhrGuZiNGbtGAiw6OmVuto6X7Ybj3OwVl0TvRmIafEvrL3Lz8YU5D-_W_t_bE=&c=EdjZK-t__XnLhDESgJ4shYzNnPfXOZVheYziCD2AUWFgUoyMCUSibg==&ch=QZVvzNM4CqnnMBCbl65sejZ7FSIuba8qmBr__jJbeeZJIvAyleGUzg==)

|

Peter, Anthony Brindisi has been a failure from the beginning.

He’s too busy pandering to the D.C. elite and liberal billionaire donors to get anything done in Congress.

While his district faces job losses and an opioid epidemic, Brindisi is playing political games. He worked with Nancy Pelosi to carry out a baseless witch hunt against President Trump. Now, our President is facing a biased trial in the Senate.

Thanks to Anthony Brindisi, Democrats could remove President Trump from office!

**That’s why we need 5,000 signatures on our petition before midnight.**

**Stand Up to Brindisi’s Betrayal**
[ **Add your name!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=89dfeef7f51942b889d05dc7a107fe25&_e=FP-9ne-iLQP11ryA6dGdignpYjhYuEIqoYDHkBKiZejs0cxLn-NKtEHlVsuAUuOggt0yHAJPasGDddCw5eE9hzEuY8lkFtzBUgOxU5u5iG4rHr_oywWC4cQiBc802Hiu96qNJy-UZbqscJCA53aKN0NG7SGQU_cpSsEcXPp8cLlK4lvf95KsqCjNx3Vir7sogzBQBHaVi2E3wnC20ak7qccbuU6STl8U_YFsdQ1dqR2jiQGRI2eXhnz64JO3lvBXOAGONasW20RV0wLuf5We1JHbglrZm_l9ooJM2ISEIQr6U3e1sQkdMJ10fpp1XruMW-CuHEJZtzVVVsK_fNkrdhIg4wb33oHNQS7lQ3GDB47iZejEnPtmH137a2loU7gAJj80CBs_ImTxvn0C2-AAPxXn1HtOojp-rJnr_ITUX3NTCPfnfBdMjsfaUoCSeGi7Ul1fhdgeC8Z92W-1Is6jNA%3D%3D)
In November 2016, New York's 22nd Congressional District elected President Trump by 15%. Three years later, Anthony Brindisi doesn't care: he promised to not support impeachment, but then voted for it THREE TIMES!

Anthony Brindisi is out of touch with the people he represents. He's more worried about pleasing Nancy Pelosi than delivering real results for his constituents.

It's time to stand up to Anthony Brindisi. Add your name if you're sick and tired of his lies and betrayal!

**Stand Up to Brindisi’s Betrayal**

name: Stacia Yim, Yang2020
subject: Pennsylvania Yang Gang, we need YOUR help to get Andrew on the PA primary ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1) Pennsylvania Yang Gang --

We want to share some vital data about the process of securing access to the primary ballot in Pennsylvania.

The state only allows a three-week-long collection window, which is one of the shortest in the nation.

Each delegate must secure their own signatures in order to be listed on the ballot, which is one of the most challenging processes in the nation.

**In total, we must collect more than 30,000 signatures in just three weeks in order to get our candidate AND his delegates on the primary ballot, which makes ballot access in Pennsylvania one of the most guarded in the nation.**

We understand that not every supporter can volunteer their time to host an event or go door to door to gather signatures.

[So we’ve set up Stop & Sign events all over the state to make it as easy as possible for the Pennsylvania Yang Gang to step up. Find yours and go add your signature now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24464?t=6&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1)

We want to show everyone that the Yang Gang will do whatever it takes to get Andrew Yang AND his delegates onto the ballot.

**If everyone reading this email signs the presidential petition and the petitions of just 2 delegates from their district, we will reach our goal!!!**

We’ve done the #MATH. Now, will you do the work?

[Please find your nearest Stop & Sign event to add your name to get Andrew on the Pennsylvania primary ballot. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24464?t=7&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1) | [Stop & Sign](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24464?t=8&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1)
---
Together, the Pennsylvania Yang Gang can help move our community, our state, and our country Not Left. Not Right. FORWARD.

Humanity First,

Stacia Yim
Ballot Access Field Director
Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24461?t=2&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2020 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=5&akid=7033%2E377263%2E1WjHP1)

name: Team Green
subject: One month from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SbfAFplv1kMmOBkyXO9PdhsWe9Wgz5O9LZN-MG-qI68=/SrXkjrq6cYvBSRj7KPP4e7q6_35_tb0q1tI66Czvk6M=)
---
**This is it: Our primary election is one month from today.** We're launching a GOTV (get out the vote!) fund to register new voters, spread the word about election dates and early voting, and make sure every eligible voter in the 9th district makes their voice heard at the ballot box this March. | **[CHIP IN TO OUR GOTV FUND](https://act.myngp.com/el/SbfAFplv1kMmOBkyXO9PdhsWe9Wgz5O9LZN-MG-qI68=/XOEk4W-NpIXhIpirYMDv7NHdKu8Gm-2PnXNxaP0wNCI=?refcode=E1049-20200203-GOTV-SB&amount=25)**
---
No matter who your first pick for President is, we have to make sure that Donald Trump and the party-line Republicans who have been protecting him are voted out of office this November. And that means getting every eligible voter to the polls.
**There 's a lot on the line this election year, and we can't afford to let anyone sit this one out. It's up to us to make our voices heard and encourage Texans across the state to do the same -- [chip in to our GOTV fund to help us spread the word and turn out the vote this Election Day!](https://act.myngp.com/el/SbfAFplv1kMmOBkyXO9PdhsWe9Wgz5O9LZN-MG-qI68=/XOEk4W-NpIXhIpirYMDv7NHdKu8Gm-2PnXNxaP0wNCI=?refcode=E1049-20200203-GOTV-SL&amount=25)**

---
Thanks for all you do,
Team Green
**P.S. Today is the last day to register to vote in the Texas primary election on March 3rd --[click here to make sure you're registered to vote and find your polling place!](https://act.myngp.com/el/SbfAFplv1kMmOBkyXO9PdhsWe9Wgz5O9LZN-MG-qI68=/-C8ZkQJBe8-kpUrRRmn8X8s1xwO_vFshIm-Dt5t17yU=)**

name: 2020 Senate Watch
subject: 51 Senate Republicans just voted for Trump's cover-up. It will end their political careers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14611263/153354935/-1907457918?refcode=01202020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVhOGZmYy1lNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fx2ZNOZfhuTM36MqZx3jgoNtl_5qfyEY3DqSoQI2_7E=)

Dear Friend, One month to primary day and it's time for our final push! The team has been on the phones all day, but we can always use more help! We're identifying Rick's supporters and making sure they've got a plan to get to the polls. We've got jobs for all tastes and personalities:
* Block Walking - enjoy knocking on your neighbors' doors and chatting? Block walking is for you! Get a friend or two (or ten!) to go with you and we'll give you the training, materials, and information you need.
* Phone Banking - would you rather help us reach out via phone? Like block walking just let us know and we'll get you set up.
* Texting - or maybe you're more comfortable with texting? We've got that option too. And yes - we'll get you trained in no time!

If any of the above sound good to you just reply to this mail and we'll get you on board. Can't volunteer but still want to help? **[Drop us a quick donation of any amount so we have plenty of water and snacks to keep our volunteers on their feet!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14611264/153354936/-1907457918?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVhOGZmYy1lNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fx2ZNOZfhuTM36MqZx3jgoNtl_5qfyEY3DqSoQI2_7E=)** | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14611265/153354937/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVhOGZmYy1lNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fx2ZNOZfhuTM36MqZx3jgoNtl_5qfyEY3DqSoQI2_7E=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14611266/153354938/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVhOGZmYy1lNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fx2ZNOZfhuTM36MqZx3jgoNtl_5qfyEY3DqSoQI2_7E=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14611267/153354939/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVhOGZmYy1lNDQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fx2ZNOZfhuTM36MqZx3jgoNtl_5qfyEY3DqSoQI2_7E=)

clean_body: | = Dear Friend, One month to primary day and it's time for our final push! The team has been on the phones all day, but we can always use more help! We're identifying Rick's supporters and making sure they've got a plan to get to the polls. We've got jobs for all tastes and personalities: Block Walking - enjoy knocking on your neighbors' doors and chatting? Block walking is for you! Get a friend or two (or ten!) to go with you and we'll give you the training, materials, and information you need. Phone Banking - would you rather help us reach out via phone? Like block walking just let us know and we'll get you set up. Texting - or maybe you're more comfortable with texting? We've got that option too. And yes - we'll get you trained in no time! If any of the above sound good to you just reply to this mail and we'll get you on board. Can't volunteer but still want to help? =** | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 75% of Iowa caucusgoers agree on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Climate action is a must-have for voters.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8408?t=3&akid=8029%2E868730%2E5V4mVR) Friend, When Iowans head out to caucus tonight, they'll have a lot on their mind. Like many Americans, one of those things -- in fact, tied for the number ONE most important thing -- is climate change. In a poll this summer, 75% of likely Iowa caucusgoers said "recognition of climate change as the greatest threat to humanity" is a "must-have" for them to support a candidate. Let me say: I wholeheartedly agree. And this goes beyond party lines. Another poll released just this month found that 72% of Americans say they want to reduce the effects of climate change -- **including a majority of Democrats, Independents,_and_ Republicans. ** No matter where you are tonight, we have to remind our friends and family what's really at stake in this election. We have to remind them there's an enormous amount of support for defeating the climate crisis. We have to remind them that climate change is a winning issue for Democrats. **[Before tonight's first-in-the-nation presidential caucus in Iowa, remind your friends and family that bold climate action is a winning issue for Democrats by sharing this news on Facebook right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8408?t=4&akid=8029%2E868730%2E5V4mVR)** | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8408?t=5&akid=8029%2E868730%2E5V4mVR)
---
Very truly yours,
Jay

| | | Today, all eyes are on Iowa. However, our campaign is not there. That's because Mike's attention is focused on winning the Democratic Primary, which means competing for the 98% of delegates who are not in Iowa. We're running a **_national_** campaign -- because it is going to take the entire nation coming together to defeat Donald Trump. Regardless of the outcome of tonight's Iowa caucuses, the facts don't change: We need a strong Democrat who can bring the party together and build the operation it will take to defeat Trump in November. Mike will get it done. [**This video shows our strategy of how Mike will win. Watch and share today.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=6057e2b37c&e=f54746ec54)

name: Women for Wilmot
subject: Standing with our sisters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
Did you know that more than 200 Republican leaders turned their backs away from their constituents by sending a brief to the Supreme Court asking them | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=yYmkwOB-DWSHcJ5cjtkfaJ10fu8pE3UK3CVF_MjTKRomteeuN11VoxyQqfI2AA1bTkkurit-cX0jyz8t2tH5V4JX2brujDnNnZ21NVXYGp91rFBgy3hkhPL3RoyrMKQkxyS1RjmdVspyCPNa6rWUijOo7CIkYGAiwWVUQTjoX8kUKS05qJG01NGboqOPMW_1FxVIDFlaonBtK6_AAo6WLmNIYeMcKuEgBl57Qtl4UCppA7aNLml9cEeGtRZc_g3UG3HTsXCm-Xx8ExYMFJzhoE8qw_8QcJTBFTWR_l7iKJgMclJBx489lrnGtwuX3SsiOZVhFAL1YmHXY0hVIg3LzQ%3D%3D) **Sign today:**
[**Tell the Supreme Court to protect _Roe v. Wade_**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=sW9j9gYrU-ZbwJ4fgU0mdAy-U-F0FASZTtQFlIKDWu7v-LnGN9luWSFa7bKeyWYZu3KJvz0hmKj8UfQVhm4C2RTZBFDns3pi9Oc6bQ45orM9Zv1XIhu55mjptIipYrqh5oIay4Q8kNPP1avc_wzwVe-9T3BNL7uM8WJBjli2SZj05tDpFGM0_OTgf6CeHjv0kCJxIHGVaiEaoDxb06pZ1AsFo6TM_nX8F0941-xI_bnT9kpWW9tP7Q0O86cDKjK8wstjSqjgNeiP9tTT2QnNYREyEePwUVrJ1LPvx3J4zsNMKqaglKrg8SGajRC_Ij9InqNLPBAYv9tOphAqID202w%3D%3D) [2,000 signatures needed](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=sW9j9gYrU-ZbwJ4fgU0mdAy-U-F0FASZTtQFlIKDWu7v-LnGN9luWSFa7bKeyWYZu3KJvz0hmKj8UfQVhm4C2RTZBFDns3pi9Oc6bQ45orM9Zv1XIhu55mjptIipYrqhoHMnQOTDu5Ffor67rVnqU51I7DY3oy4fSC9UCcXBwVZl02SDBiJQkc0AZdyEJgqQDWwJ5rfhqri2_c55CHvDvngBXuiM0Lv6g_wxbYSddlcjctoppNxTOKQXaAY9n6cW1fOTjUMnikoy7ErcQaoia0Q64jCz8J2XZvmZxqpilC7BGqszQ_jOVpEIDyWVMRJ74xCPtIj4c-EtcKUnj1WKsg%3D%3D)
* * *
Did you know that more than 200 Republican leaders turned their backs away from their constituents by sending a brief to the Supreme Court asking them to overturn _Roe v. Wade_? This is shameful. We will not go back to the era when women had so little bodily autonomy. Roe not only enshrined a woman’s right to control her own body but also allowed women to enter the workforce and help reshape our country as leaders of our communities. [**These 200 conservative legislators want to take us back. Let’s show them that we’ll fight them tooth and nail. Can we get 2,000 people to sign this petition to tell the Supreme Court to PROTECT _Roe v. Wade_?**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=yYmkwOB-DWSHcJ5cjtkfaJ10fu8pE3UK3CVF_MjTKRomteeuN11VoxyQqfI2AA1bTkkurit-cX0jyz8t2tH5V4JX2brujDnNnZ21NVXYGp91rFBgy3hkhPL3RoyrMKQkhZ52UXCZ3bEfwhr9eWf-U7sg888Pnvjb-aS3eiTu_FdnOiWXbIMTcRdG9jn82cgNGZgE86_svI52kA4PoRwrec8llK7vUdcDbdPSLR9hPOdZ9eizjYnifsSubNmpmq_uGYRScO0c6R8CfQQaduAkKJScjZpiivpjxvDUF6eT-7q60s-XQMD6dME40mPkBtOXti4U-UW0MnxnwuHVcZkUqQ%3D%3D) Once again, we see that Republican leaders like Senator Steve Daines don’t care about protecting women’s rights, they want to control women’s bodies. They want to protect their own power. [**Sign now if you stand with women -- we need our voices to be heard.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=yYmkwOB-DWSHcJ5cjtkfaJ10fu8pE3UK3CVF_MjTKRomteeuN11VoxyQqfI2AA1bTkkurit-cX0jyz8t2tH5V4JX2brujDnNnZ21NVXYGp91rFBgy3hkhPL3RoyrMKQkErfpEQr22c2wAGVhQJSUe3CD3Sfb6KIrarLK9_JyZbxkJ4rpGosdxz8qBDmCiz4qQavIrvcnVJ3XzgLffhSazwd1LeUQMAZqgiLL4Cnav7ZwMrQK-GKY8ur12ldC9CH4QXGWK5ZEDACz3s__ZeJrnnllxzPUAb2H-ia0KXSy2nvpegYBIauyNZEuB-0NK-E5AUdk9Zj8ZNwKvCmhmVG6gw%3D%3D) Thanks,
Women for Wilmot

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=75b7ea6a5f964e6e9c76a75433468d9f&_e=yYmkwOB-DWSHcJ5cjtkfaMx8j_z2G4MrnxWCIGbT3lAI1X86WP9pcYkSFslMtlJ46N7f8QZMwZir7rCBpUDNOlehtLsmTgi_e4EllRz2rPrO0NCPUqJ_aiInATD03kP9p-xqQLqfvswmGti9a9CitJIyLq6ZYVRXRijSBcrj9vRMxfc0ETTPiFvpoECACXX0fKqlQAvw7BzLWI0YOSYbKR6hXrSqx6IZ_6ab0ZzH1XMPUHMy2iiltQ6385_-WqMHKlssAQ0TikCLSdu3mmk1fXQpPwpOJ5Wy_JnxSt4X2CDEZnUHc6nS_e_OduqSi1ijW2Gv_hOgxYaHzLIMbm_z8Ik84feQrC7obfr8zCgxKDqkdlIB5-3p5u3TYqD7k7tSi8-hzjSLEMAtGXmGbFrwkwP3wuSFzuH6CmggVQsMMGHbK3m1SNXUuekI9bcUXZtVznvebdcvhOsEQfgQhrxyth28iakOqNIIUGrqizlNK-6FwFsBXUJuC1VCreCu4a6D)

name: Mark Warner
subject: I'm frustrated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I know you just heard from me, but I wanted to write again.
|
---
| | Derek,

I know you just heard from me, but I wanted to write again because, frankly, I'm frustrated.

When Donald Trump's impeachment trial started, I approached my constitutional duty to serve as a juror with the seriousness it deserves. I've been doing my best to remain impartial, because I wanted to hear from witnesses like John Bolton and Mick Mulvaney who could help us get to the truth. But frankly I don't see how last week's Senate vote to block witnesses is anything other than an admission that what they would say under oath would reflect badly on the President.

If you're frustrated like I am, it's time to get to work. The best promise we can make to ourselves and our country now is to defend the progress we've already made and keep our Commonwealth blue this November. **Can I count on your help?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae93/2543446194/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?express_lane=true&refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae92/2543446194/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?express_lane=true&refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae91/2543446194/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?express_lane=true&refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae90/2543446194/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?express_lane=true&refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae9f/2543446194/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?express_lane=true&refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae9e/2543446194/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** The path to Democratic majorities in Congress runs right through Virginia. That's why the Trump campaign and Republican donors are pouring money into the state. They organized over 80 events across the Commonwealth in 2019 -- and they show no sign of letting up.

I trust Virginia Democrats to mobilize and help win up and down the ticket. And I'll be right there fighting beside you. I need your support to keep fighting for you in the U.S. Senate. Whether it's voting, volunteering, talking to friends and family, or supporting campaigns like mine -- you're making a real change.

Thank you for staying in the fight with me.

-- Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d657/53d9897e/537a34c9/1c89ae9d/2543446194/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-stayblue?refcode=20200203_f_1_nd__455__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

body:
Today is the LAST DAY to register to vote in the Texas primary!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489044d/7f51f7bc/4d7b2769/4ef05606/3915448523/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | Amount Needed to Reach Goal:
$21,904

Deadline:
MIDNIGHT [**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489044d/7f51f7bc/4d7b2769/4ef05605/3915448523/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primary-registration-deadline?refcode=email_20200203.2nd__859__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter -- **If you plan to vote in the Texas primary, (and we hope you are!) today is the LAST DAY to register![If you haven't registered, print and mail your form today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489044d/7f51f7bc/4d7b2769/4ef05604/3915448523/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://webservices.sos.state.tx.us/vrapp/index.asp")**

Already registered? Great! **[Can you help us reach the _many_ undecided voters still out there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489044d/7f51f7bc/4d7b2769/4ef05605/3915448523/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primary-registration-deadline?refcode=email_20200203.2nd__859__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Your support will be _crucial_ to overcoming the special interests who want to make sure Sen. Cornyn keeps his seat. He's already stockpiled **_over $12 million_** to buy his way to reelection, including more than:
* $1,200,000 from pharmaceutical companies
* $200,000 from the gun lobby
* $90,000 from private detention company PACs and executives!

**[Rush a donation now to help us reach our goal and fight back against Sen. Cornyn's big-money allies >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489044d/7f51f7bc/4d7b2769/4ef05605/3915448523/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primary-registration-deadline?refcode=email_20200203.2nd__859__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**The Koch network has also _already_ run ad campaigns in Texas**, and big-money groups allied with Mitch McConnell have raised record-breaking amounts to defend his Senate majority.

**MJ is doing things differently.** This grassroots team is powered by 29,000+ grassroots donors and counting, with an average online contribution of just $22. The truth is we don't need to match Sen. Cornyn's money dollar-for-dollar. We just need enough to execute our strategy and WIN on Election Day!

**Pitch in before midnight to help us reach our goal and give MJ the resources she needs to BEAT Sen. Cornyn:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter Willis , If you haven't already, there is still time to RSVP for our breakfast with Congressman Devin Nunes in Tulsa next Friday, February 14th at 8AM. With only 39 tickets remaining, however, we expect those seats to fill quickly, so don't miss out! [Click here to RSVP right now!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/N9qiZrJe763xwB0PITvf6VdQ/gldTesGofzdBXMOOkWnKLw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/N9qiZrJe763xwB0PITvf6VdQ/gldTesGofzdBXMOOkWnKLw) **Please note, the deadline to RSVP is this Thursday, February 6th at 5PM, so we need your RSVP right away. ** I hope to see you on the 14th! Famed strategist James Carville endorsed Michael because he knows that he will be "the end of Trumpism."

[_He said if Michael 's the nominee, he'll get 55% of the vote and win us 55 Senate seats._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaad0/134673f2/37beab92/699720a6/3354826952/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/carville-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020320_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Team, there's just over a week until New Hampshire votes.

_Over half_ of primary voters are still undecided, and we need to make sure we can get this message about how Michael is the candidate to win in front of as many of them as possible. Our momentum has been building, but we can't compete without more resources.

name: Andrew Yang for President
subject: The narrative of tonight will be determined by a couple things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7057%2E377263%2EpE5Idy) Yang Gang --

We know we just did a big fundraising push at the end of January, but we have to ask you to give again today. We hope you’ll let us explain why.

We have organizers in Iowa, but also in New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina working their hearts out today.

Because while the eyes of the country and political world are on Iowa tonight, we’re not stopping our organizing work anywhere. We know this nomination will be a long battle, and we have long-term plans to win it.

That said, the narrative of tonight will be determined by a couple things: who meets or exceeds expectations -- and whose supporters raise a large amount of money and send in a big amount of contributions.

The media will use these pieces of information to talk about viability for our campaign. And we know that everyone reading this email can control one of those things right now.

**[Help us bring in a large number of contributions and put up a big number between now and tomorrow. Contribute $10 or more today.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24547?t=5&akid=7057%2E377263%2EpE5Idy)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24547?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7057%2E377263%2EpE5Idy)

Team Yang

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: How I'm feeling about the presidential race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/15864635/2950132501/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The first votes in the 2020 presidential election start tonight, while Donald Trump is standing trial in the U.S. Senate for abuse of power and obstruction. _It's a lot, isn't it?_ Here's my bottom line: **Make no mistake, our We the People democracy is on the ballot in November.** The Republican Party has firmly committed itself to locking in minority rule through dark money, voter suppression, gerrymandering, and now giving license to the president to use his office to manipulate elections. Also on the ballot: whether we meet the climate crisis that's already impacting all of us. Whether your health is a right, or a profit center for huge corporations. Access to higher education, good career and technical training, and a K-12 education that prepares kids to thrive. Clean air and water. And so much more. There are so many qualified and inspiring candidates running for the Democratic nomination. I'm sure you have a favorite (or two or three). **But, please, no matter how much passion you have for your favored candidate, how hard you fight to help them win, please save a little space in your heart for whoever eventually wins our party's nomination.** At that point we have to come together with 110% of our energy to put him or her into the Oval Office. **We have to fight like hell to defeat Donald Trump.** Every single Democrat running for president would be a huge improvement over the corruption, lying, hate, and attacks on democracy coming from this White House and this administration. And the way we're going to win is if we all unite together against the biggest threat of all: four more years of a Trump-Pence presidency. And not just the White House. **In order to make the big change we want to see, we have to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the Republicans.** The Senate is currently sitting on hundreds of bills that have passed the House because Mitch McConnell refuses to bring them up for a vote. We have to organize in our communities, knock on doors, make phone calls, chip in donations, and send Mitch McConnell packing. So, as the first results come in tonight, and the presidential race unfolds, remember, we are all in this together. We all want to see a Democrat in the White House. We all want an economy that works for all of us, not just the wealthy few. We all want a president who espouses compassion, empathy and competence. And we all want to put this very dark period in history behind us. **It's time to Dump Trump, Ditch Mitch, and Save America! We can get there, together.** Onward! _Jeff _ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/15864632/2950132501/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-02-03-iowa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/15864633/2950132501/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-02-03-iowa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/15864630/2950132501/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-03-iowa&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/15864631/2950132501/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-03-iowa&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---

[Contact us here.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fbd2/6cd27893/533382b8/1586462a/2950132501/VEsHBQ/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/contact/") |

name: Terry Neese
subject: Action Required: Do you support President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, As the Democrats begin their first primary contest of the year, it's important we remember what we're fighting for. For the past few months, President Trump has faced unprecedented attacks by the radical left and never wavered in his commitment to Keep America Great. **Our economy is as strong as it 's ever been with the lowest unemployment rate since 1969, the highest wages for working-class Americans in years, and nearly 7 million jobs created since 2017. ** After these outstanding results, it's not surprising confidence in the U.S. economy is at its highest point since 2000. More and more Americans believe they are better off now than they were under President Obama. [**What do you think? Are you better off now than you were just 4 years ago?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/p3H6SuUxA9H8zhnD9YJoOw/zabHAaixMfAg4Yd2pejT2A) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/p3H6SuUxA9H8zhnD9YJoOw/zabHAaixMfAg4Yd2pejT2A) [**Submit your vote and let us know if you believe the state of our union is stronger under President Trump!**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/p3H6SuUxA9H8zhnD9YJoOw/zabHAaixMfAg4Yd2pejT2A) I'm running for Congress to represent the voice of Oklahoma and ensure Congress works on the behalf of the American people. [**Help me fight for you in Congress by sharing your voice today!**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/p3H6SuUxA9H8zhnD9YJoOw/zabHAaixMfAg4Yd2pejT2A) Terry Neese

---
| _**Did you catch President Trump's Super Bowl Commerical?**_
---
| Hoosier Republican, We wanted to make sure you didn't miss President Trump and Vice President Pence's Super Bowl commercial this year that has everyone talking.

President Trump keeps his promises, and thousands of families are being reunited and brought back together thanks to the president's leadership on criminal justice reform.

The commercial features Alice Marie Johnson, a woman who was imprisoned for over two decades for a non-violent offense. [Watch the video now by clicking below](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70d16ea3e8&e=1acd9bb3d6), and hear Ms. Johnson's story:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
body:
The Senate heard closing arguments today on House Democrats’ sham impeachment. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96eef44bcb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 3, 2020
---
| | |
# **0+0=0**

**The Senate **heard closing arguments today on House Democrats’ sham impeachment.

**Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA)** and his team claim their case is as simple as “two plus two equals four.” But nothing in their phony impeachment adds up—unless the math is 0+0=0.

[Roll the tape: None of this began with a phone call.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7188fc039&e=3ee4985eea)

**After trying to impeach** this President for over 3 years, here is their “case”:
* _Zero crimes._ Forget “High Crimes and Misdemeanors,” which the Constitution requires to impeach and remove a sitting President. Democrats’ weak articles of impeachment don’t include _any_ alleged criminal violations at all. It’s the first impeachment in American history based on no crimes, only policy disputes.

* _Zero wrongdoing._ No matter how much House Democrats tried to rig the process, the facts remain the same: The President did nothing wrong. At the core of their impeachment hoax is a simple disagreement about when potential corruption should be investigated and when it shouldn’t be. (Hint: If it involves a Democrat, they say it isn’t worth looking into!)

* _Result: Zero bipartisan support_. Democrat leaders couldn’t make their case, so their impeachment made history in a second way: It’s the first one without _any_ bipartisan support. In fact, the only bipartisanship was _against_ their articles.

**For good measure** , there are a few other important “zeroes,” too. One is the zero pressure felt by Ukraine stemming from any alleged quid pro quo. “Nobody pushed—pushed me,” President Zelenskyy said.

**Another is the fact** that no quid pro quo happened at all: Ukraine received all of its aid on time with zero investigations announced. President Trump and President Zelenskyy met at the UN General Assembly in New York with no preconditions, as well.

**Since nothing Democrats** allege actually took place, their case to remove a sitting President—and throw him off the ballot entirely, preventing reelection by taking the choice away from American voters—rests purely on their own imaginations.

**The facts are clear**. House Democrats’ partisan impeachment stunt has exposed a real threat to the Constitution, but they won’t find that threat by continuing to attack and obstruct President Trump. They’ll find it by looking in the mirror.

[In photos: While Democrats impeach, President Trump replaces NAFTA.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8505b4a253&e=3ee4985eea)

**Something to share** : [President Trump works for you, not Democrat leaders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fde8d51e7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: Ivanka Trump helps lead historic summit on human trafficking**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ba21f01f6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Ivanka Trump joined** the President, Vice President Mike Pence, and Cabinet officials on Friday as the White House led a historic summit to mark the twentieth anniversary of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act.

**“My administration** is 100 percent committed to eradicating human trafficking from the Earth,” President Trump said.

**An estimated 25 million** people around the world are being held captive, manipulated, and abused by human traffickers today. In addition to locking away these criminals, the Trump Administration has prioritized more funding for anti-trafficking efforts in the 2021 budget, allocating $70 million toward enhanced prosecutions.

[Read President Trump’s full remarks on how to end human trafficking.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50c70ffea1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump ****view a performance by members of the Florida Atlantic University marching band** | February 2, 2020
---
|

Our vision is nothing less than a livable planet: clean water, cooler oceans, thriving salmon runs, towering forests, and an atmosphere that can sustain us for infinite generations to come. To get there, we will create millions of family-sustaining jobs in renewable energy, invest in reforestation and regenerative agriculture, and make the fossil fuel corporations pay to clean up the pollution that now threatens our very survival. Oregonians have been leading the fight to stop the fossil fuel industry's expansion with the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline for 15 years, while the** Democratic establishment has backed Jordan Cove.** That's why we're in this race. Climate Hawks Vote endorsed our campaign today because we've been standing strong against the Jordan Cove since day one, and have rejected any contributions from the fossil fuel industry. We're bringing a vision of just transition to renewable energy and regenerative forestry that brings jobs to Oregon that last for generations to come. But we can't win this fight without you.
[Donate $10, $20, $100 or whatever you can afford, right now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4gA/ni0YAA/t.2yy/GRx72b2XTPSy-uqpWphbXg/h8/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLDm1Km4J7DIaO3v0nO4Ayfyz21AScZL3SCANgOvYjvkUhrmTu98mXpvJbBYqZaX1Gb0Zv9rWfqcNowmCz0Gxtn7O1W0rxnh2ZRz43ZEc1DMuUjmEy37ErqYjuv2emR8UohXmqNZL-2BOF80ZK-2BGX9yop18fLXG1UmbhArlG12OaWdAEaaZO9sdTf657i4MBxeb08Fs0dhHMb3gre53OVwhxb5CKUpqwdCSly77mZocgQrmiTzxxj5kEjwswOpmty4-2FsC3D6iSlE-2F-2BsRhaBSfHnPcPP-2F9UbtOjYhjfQbXc-2Fwc5Q-3D-3D/lxNc) Onward! While the incumbent has now raked in over $1.5 million, mostly from corporate PACs, our fundraising is entirely powered by people like you. | Our vision is nothing less than a livable planet: clean water, cooler oceans, thriving salmon runs, towering forests, and an atmosphere that can sustain us for infinite generations to come. To get there, we will create millions of family-sustaining jobs in renewable energy, invest in reforestation and regenerative agriculture, and make the fossil fuel corporations pay to clean up the pollution that now threatens our very survival. Oregonians have been leading the fight to stop the fossil fuel industry's expansion with the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline for 15 years, while the Democratic establishment has backed Jordan Cove. That's why we're in this race. Climate Hawks Vote endorsed our campaign today because we've been standing strong against the Jordan Cove since day one, and have rejected any contributions from the fossil fuel industry. We're bringing a vision of just transition to renewable energy and regenerative forestry that brings jobs to Oregon that last for generations to come. But we can't win this fight without you. Onward!
